zh.Depwade, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可德瓦德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Uvedale於1305年出生在英國素瑞時，他的父親John De Uvedale II35歲，母親Isabel d' Etton26歲。他於1341年與Margaret Rees在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可德瓦德享年60歲。

zh-hans.Depwade, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可德瓦德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Uvedale于1305年出生在英国素瑞时，他的父亲John De Uvedale II35岁，母亲Isabel d' Etton26岁。他于1341年与Margaret Rees在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1365年在英国英格兰諾福爾可德瓦德享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Uvedale was born in 1305, in Surrey, England, his father, John De Uvedale II, was 35 and his mother, Isabel d' Etton, was 26. He married Margaret Rees in 1341, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1365, in Depwade, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Uvedale est né en 1305, à Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John De Uvedale II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabel d' Etton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Rees en 1341, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1365, à Depwade, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Uvedale 1305 in Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Uvedale II 35 und seine Mutter Isabel d' Etton 26. Er hat 1341 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Rees geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Depwade, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Uvedale è nato il nel 1305 nel Surrey, England, il suo padre, John De Uvedale II, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Isabel d' Etton, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Rees nel 1341, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1365, nel Depwade, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Uvedaleが1305年にイギリススリーで生まれた時，父John De Uvedale IIは35歳，母Isabel d' Ettonは26歳であった。1341年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Reesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1365年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクデプワドで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Uvedale(이)가 1305년 영국 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Uvedale II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel d' Etton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1341년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Rees(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 데p웨이드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Uvedale nasceu em 1305, em Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Uvedale II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabel d' Etton, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Rees em 1341, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1365, em Depwade, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Uvedale родился в 1305 г. в местности сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Uvedale II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel d' Etton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Rees в 1341 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности депвад, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Uvedale nació en 1305, en Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Uvedale II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabel d' Etton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Rees en 1341, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1365, en Depwade, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
